message:
feat(conformance): add graph-isomorphism deduplication binary (G4)

Add dedupe_regressions binary that scans the regression corpus for
fixtures with isomorphic graphs to avoid duplicates.

Features:
- Loads all regression fixtures recursively
- Builds graphs from expected.graph or operations
- Quick rejects based on node/edge count before full isomorphism check
- Reports canonical fixtures and their duplicates
- --check flag for CI integration (exit 1 if duplicates found)
- --verbose flag for detailed match logging

Usage: cargo run -p fnx-conformance --bin dedupe_regressions --check

Closes: franken_networkx-gyu7 (G4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
